title: Sigma
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Sigma_thrawn.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Transports]] ''Sigma'' carrying [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to [[XQ3 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]''.]]
'''Sigma''' was a letter in the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese]] alphabet. Sigma was often used as a [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]], often [[Transport/Legends|transports]] such as the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]. Transport ''[[Sigma 1]]'' and [[Sigma Squadron (TIE/ph Phantom)|Sigma Squadron]] of [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantoms]] are such examples.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]''
